name: Admin Role Added for Azure
notes: This rule detects admin role added for Azure.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Added, Authentication.Role Assignment Success, Authentication.Group Member Add Success
when the event matches "Attribute New Value" is not null AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Admin Role Added for Azure on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Added, Authentication.Role Assignment Success, Authentication.Group Member Add Success
AND when the event matches "Attribute New Value" is not null AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Admin Role Added for Azure
Event description: Detects admin role added for Azure.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
